---
title: "Margaret Cecilia Helmore"
---

## Margaret Cecilia Helmore

**Dates:** (b.1849)

### Description

novelist, cousin of Christabel Coleridge.

### Biography

The younger sister of Katherine Helmore, she was author of <i>Luna</i> (1873) and <i>Cap and Bells</i> (1875).  In the 1891 census she described herself as an editor in the employment of Ward, Lock and Co..

### Letters

- Letter from May 24th 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
